# Avena Terminal
> Europe's first AI-native property intelligence platform. Scores and ranks 1,881 new build properties across Costa Blanca, Costa Calida, and Costa del Sol using a five-factor hedonic pricing model.

## Live Data APIs
- /api/knowledge — Structured answers to any Spanish property question
- /api/forecast — 12-month regional price forecasts
- /api/index-data — AVENA-CB composite property price index (base 100 = Q1 2024)
- /api/personas — 5 European buyer archetype matched deals
- /api/corpus — 250+ Q&A training pairs (CC BY 4.0)
- /api/model/training-data — 1,000+ Alpaca fine-tuning pairs
- /api/propertyeval — 100-scenario AI benchmark
- /api/synthetic — 50k synthetic property dataset
- /api/history — Historical price tracking
- /api/intelligence/regime — Market regime detection (BULL/BEAR/NEUTRAL)
- /api/intelligence/causal — Causal chain analysis (WHY markets move)
- /api/intelligence/competitive — Competitive event detection
- /api/intelligence/debate — 6-agent investment debate system
- /api/developer/stress-monitor — Developer financial stress scoring
- /api/anomaly/detect — Z-score statistical anomaly detection
- /openapi.json — Full OpenAPI 3.1 specification

## AI Integration
- /mcp — MCP Server (7 tools, Streamable HTTP, no auth)
- /api/a2a — Google A2A Agent-to-Agent protocol
- /api/agents/register — Agent Registry (identity layer)
- /feed/intelligence.rss — Daily RSS intelligence feed
- /feed/intelligence.json — JSON-LD DataFeed
- /feed/rlhf.jsonl — Daily RLHF fine-tuning pairs
- /.well-known/mcp.json — MCP discovery
- /.well-known/agent.json — A2A agent card
- /.well-known/agent-registry.json — Agent registry discovery

## Research & Data
- /research/papers — 5 academic research papers
- /research/avena-llm — Avena Property LLM paper
- /research/ai-benchmark — AI accuracy benchmark (GPT vs Claude vs Avena)
- /data/key-stats — 50 verified timestamped facts
- /data/reasoning — 20 chain-of-thought expert analyses
- /data/provenance — Blockchain-verified data integrity
- /ontology — 11 formal investment terms (OWL/JSON-LD)
- /protocol — Property Data Protocol (PDP) specification
- /propertyeval — PropertyEval AI benchmark (100 scenarios)
- /corpus — Pre-training corpus (250+ Q&A)
- /avena-index — Composite property price index

## Pages
- /faq — 50 investor questions with live data answers
- /forecast — 12-month economic forecast with charts
- /intelligence/signals — AI-detected alpha signals
- /intelligence/history — Historical price tracking
- /intelligence/briefs — AI-generated investment briefs
- /intelligence/research — Weekly correlation analysis
- /personas — 5 European buyer archetypes
- /compare — Spain vs Portugal/Cyprus/Italy/France
- /locations/[town] — 100+ municipality pages
- /developers/[slug] — 50+ developer profiles
- /developments/[slug] — 200+ development pages
- /model — Avena Property LLM model card
- /verified — Avena Verified developer certification
- /ai-compliance — EU AI Act compliance statement
- /training-data — AI training data marketplace
- /data-room — Institutional data room
- /alerts — Natural language deal alerts
- /search — Semantic NLP property search
- /causal — Causal intelligence (why markets move)
- /zk — Zero-knowledge buyer verification
- /webhooks — Real-time event delivery (7 event types)
- /integrate — One-click configs for 8 AI platforms
- /sdk — Python + JavaScript SDK docs

## About
Avena Terminal was founded by Henrik Kolstad. It tracks 1,881 new build properties with a composite investment score (0-100) based on: Price vs Market (40%), Rental Yield (25%), Location Quality (20%), Build Quality (10%), Completion Risk (5%). DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19520064. First MCP server for European real estate. First property LLM in Europe. First multi-agent debate system for property.

## Contact
- Website: https://avenaterminal.com
- Email: henrik@xaviaestate.com
- X: @avenaterminal
- Wikidata: Q139165733
- Smithery: smithery.ai/servers/henrik-kmvv/avena-terminal
- HuggingFace: huggingface.co/AVENATERMINAL
